headline: Israel readies strike on Iran as US‑Iran talks loom, Ukraine faces drone onslaught
subheadline: IDF sealed a 16‑km Rafah tunnel with 30,000 m³ concrete while Russian Shahed swarms hit four Ukrainian regions, nine drones over Poltava alone.
lede: Israel's engineering corps completed sealing a more than 16‑km Hamas tunnel in southern Rafah, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete and destroying roughly 80 living quarters and a command centre. Defense Minister Yoav Katz announced preparation for "Blue and White" operations inside Iran, with targets already identified, even as the United States schedules a high‑level meeting with Iran in Doha tomorrow. In the north, Israel has shifted to "Plan B", expanding its security zone north of the Litani River after U.S. pressure linked the Lebanese and Iranian fronts. Meanwhile, Russia launched massive Shahed drone waves across Poltava, Kremenchuk, Kharkiv and Sumy, while advancing ground forces in Dnipropetrovsk and Zaporizhzhia.

sections.title: Russia escalates drone and ground offensives
sections.body: Shahed drones struck Poltava, Kremenchuk, Kharkiv and Sumy in multiple waves, with up to nine drones over Poltava simultaneously. Russian tactical aviation delivered guided aerial bombs on Zaporizhzhia and Kharkiv regions, and damaged energy facilities in Zaporizhzhia, causing widespread outages in Kherson. Ground forces liberated the settlements of Pysantsy in Dnipropetrovsk direction and Novoselovka in eastern Zaporizhzhia. The Ukrainian 154th Separate Mechanized Brigade commander, Vladimir Kononnikov, was found dead under circumstances still under investigation.

sections.title: Israel shifts to Plan B, eyes Iran
sections.body: IDF engineering forces sealed a 16+ km tunnel in southern Rafah, using over 30,000 cubic meters of concrete and destroying about 80 residential units and a command centre. Defense Minister Yoav Katz said U.S. President Trump pressured Netanyahu to link the Lebanese and Iranian arenas, prompting Israel to adopt "Plan B" and expand the security zone north of the Litani River. Katz ordered the IDF to ready "Blue and White" operations inside Iran, stating targets are identified and forces are on alert. Iran has requested a meeting with the United States in Doha tomorrow, while Hezbollah remains degraded but still holds roughly 30 operatives in tunnels beneath Ali Taher Ridge.

sections.title: Intelligence Assessment
sections.body: The data shows simultaneous escalation across two fronts: Israel is moving from tactical tunnel clearance to strategic planning against Iran, while Russia is coordinating multi‑axis drone swarms and limited ground gains to pressure Ukraine's infrastructure. Diplomatic channels, such as the US‑Iran meeting in Doha, may serve as an off‑ramp, but the readiness of Israeli forces for strikes inside Iran and the volatile Lebanese front raise the risk of rapid regional spillover.
